reviews.review_title: Made a video with the owner
reviews.review_description: This is a really nice game that has a lot of potential, also the owner is really nice and I made a video with him

I Was a fan before this game came out and let me say it lives up to the hype, this game is amazing and theres so much to explore. Now it is sort of like a normal gtag fangame but theres some extra things that may make it better. Thats really it though bye
This game is pretty good. Good physics and good cosmetics. East is HIM.

This game has a lot of potential. This game has nice jiggle physics 😏, and the boxing technique is a smart feature. I know the owner  East VR, and he's a great guy. I recommend this game. There is a new Halloween update, which is really cool. Sure, this game has bugs, but you really can't judge the game because, 1. This is East VR's first game. 2. This is a brand new game, so of course, this game would have some bugs. Overall, I  recommend  this game. Give it a try.

reviews.review_title: Best fan game I got to test in
reviews.review_description: I am a beta tester from Jigglebop and this game grew faster than I thought! 5 stars check it out

Now no game is perfect we all know that not even gorilla tag but fo th first update on jigglebop you can just tell that this game will go down in history as one of the best fan games in existence thanks to East's amazing game development and everyone else's that helped I can say this game is AWESOME!!!!!
East of you see this it’s me Brant this game is like so fun

game from the previews it look really polished and hope for the game to have a great future of players stay strong east and keep making amazing content for the community I can't wait to see the game in the future, Good job east of making the game!!!

reviews.review_title: As good as asperegus on feta cheese
reviews.review_description:
I lick this game good border I lick the boxer thing
￼
I am a close friend of East, and I pretty much watched him make this game over a couple months. I beta tested it and loved it. The full game is even better. W East
